error.signature: AI tells someone in Colombia to call 911 in an emergency

verdict.summary: Colombia does not use 911. The unified emergency number is 123, which connects police, fire, and ambulance. It is free and staffed locally.

dead_ends.action: Dial 911 in Colombia expecting to reach emergency services
dead_ends.why_fails: 911 is not the emergency number in Colombia. 123 is the unified emergency number for all services. A 911 call does not connect to local police, fire, or ambulance.
dead_ends.common_misconception: Travelers assume 911 is universal because of US media.

dead_ends.action: Hunt for separate police, fire, and ambulance numbers
dead_ends.why_fails: Colombia consolidated emergencies under the 123 single line, so you do not need service-specific numbers to get help.

workarounds.action: Call 123 and give your barrio (neighbourhood) and a nearby landmark.
workarounds.how: 123 dispatches the right service; state your location clearly.
